books.title: The Created Legend
books.author: Fyodor Sologub
books.summary: In a provincial town a Russian poet draws himself away from society to create his utopia.

books.title: Greenmantle
books.author: John Buchan
books.summary: The story of a chase through war-torn Europe to prevent an uprising during the First World War.

books.title: Running a Thousand Miles for Freedom
books.author: William Craft
books.summary: The authors escape from slavery by posing as a slaveowner and his slave.

books.title: A General History of the Pirates
books.author: Captain Charles Johnson
books.summary: The lives and stories of the daring pirate outlaws who terrorized the Atlantic Ocean and Caribbean Sea in the 18th century.

books.title: Bambi
books.author: Felix Salten
books.summary: A roe deer learns the rules of the forest and how to survive in a world inhabited by men as he grows to maturity.

books.title: Sunshine Sketches of a Little Town
books.author: Stephen Leacock
books.summary: A humorous account of life in the fictional small town of Mariposa.

books.title: The School for Scandal
books.author: Richard Brinsley Sheridan
books.summary: Despite their best efforts, the rumormongers of 18th-century London are disappointed by their targets.

books.title: At the Back of the North Wind
books.author: George MacDonald
books.summary: A young boy’s life is transformed by his visit to the country at the back of the north wind.

books.title: Those Barren Leaves
books.author: Aldous Huxley
books.summary: An aristocrat summons a group of “intelligentsia” to vacation in her Italian mansion.

books.title: The Return
books.author: Walter de la Mare
books.summary: After visiting a graveyard, a man finds his appearance has mysteriously changed.

books.title: Red Dusk and the Morrow
books.author: Paul Dukes
books.summary: A newly-minted secret agent is sent to pick up the pieces of Britain’s spy networks after they are shattered by the Red Terror.

books.title: The Innocence of Father Brown
books.author: G. K. Chesterton
books.summary: Amateur detective and Catholic priest Father Brown solves mysteries in this first collection of Father Brown short stories.

books.title: The Economic Consequences of the Peace
books.author: John Maynard Keynes
books.summary: Keynes presents a first-hand account of the 1919 Paris Peace Conference and an analysis of the resulting Versailles treaty.

books.title: A Vindication of the Rights of Woman
books.author: Mary Wollstonecraft
books.summary: Wollstonecraft argues for equal treatment of women in society, especially in matters of education.

books.title: Poetry
books.author: Taras Shevchenko
books.summary: A collection of Taras Shevchenko’s poetry.

books.title: The Works of Max Beerbohm
books.author: Max Beerbohm
books.summary: A collection of satirical essays ridiculing pretentiousness through imitation.

books.title: Space Viking
books.author: H. Beam Piper
books.summary: A tragic starfarer seeks revenge in this epic space opera.

books.title: Ghost Stories
books.author: E. F. Benson
books.summary: A collection of ghost stories by E. F. Benson.

books.title: An Inquiry Into the Accordancy of War with the Principles of Christianity
books.author: Jonathan Dymond
books.summary: Dymond argues that war is incompatible with the teachings of Christianity.

books.title: Scrambles Amongst the Alps in the Years 1860–69
books.author: Edward Whymper
books.summary: A classic in early mountaineering literature, describing the first ascent of the Matterhorn and other climbs in the Alps.
